name: trovex
description: Serves coding agents one canonical doc per query instead of rereading the repo — ~60% fewer tokens.
long_description: trovex indexes your repo's markdown and exposes one MCP tool. Your agent asks a question; trovex returns the single current doc that answers it (path:line + freshness marker) and serves just the section that answers — not the whole file, not a pile of candidates. Runs locally: vectors in SQLite, embeddings via ONNX, no cloud or API keys.

tools.name: trovex
tools.description: Route a query to the one canonical .md doc (path:line pointers + freshness).

tools.name: trovex_read
tools.description: Read a trovex-owned doc by query or id; optionally just one section.

tools.name: trovex_search
tools.description: Passage-level retrieval across the store with tag/kind filters.

tools.name: trovex_write
tools.description: Store a doc inside trovex; patch one section in place with section=.

tools.name: trovex_tag
tools.description: Add or remove tags on a stored doc.
